name: RomM
description: A beautiful, powerful, self-hosted rom manager
compose:
name: slashnode-romm
services:
  server:
    image: rommapp/romm:4.9.2
    container_name: romm-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    environment:
      DB_HOST: romm-db
      DB_NAME: romm
      DB_USER: romm-user
      DB_PASSWD: moneyprintergobrr
      ROMM_AUTH_SECRET_KEY: ${secret.APP_SEED}
    volumes:
      - server_data-resources:/romm/resources
      - server_data-redis:/redis-data
      - server_data-library:/romm/library
      - server_data-assets:/romm/assets
      - server_data-config:/romm/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:4002:8080
  db:
    image: mariadb:11.4.5
    container_name: romm-db
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      MARIADB_ROOT_PASSWORD: umbrel
      MARIADB_DATABASE: romm
      MARIADB_USER: romm-user
      MARIADB_PASSWORD: moneyprintergobrr
    volumes:
      - db_data-db:/var/lib/mysql
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-resources:
    name: slashnode-romm_server_data-resources
  server_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-romm_server_data-redis
  server_data-library:
    name: slashnode-romm_server_data-library
  server_data-assets:
    name: slashnode-romm_server_data-assets
  server_data-config:
    name: slashnode-romm_server_data-config
  db_data-db:
    name: slashnode-romm_db_data-db
